# Templates

**Version**: 1.0.0
**Last Updated**: 2025-12-15

---

## 1. Feature Spec Templates

### 1.1 Main Spec Template

```yaml
# main.yaml - Feature Overview Template
# Generated by: stage1-phase3-spec-generation
# Model: {model-name}
# Feature: FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}

feature:
  id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
  screen_id: "{ScreenId}"
  domain: "{DOMAIN}"
  name: "{Feature Name}"
  description: "{Brief description}"

priority:
  group: "P{0-3}"
  complexity: "{HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW}"
  score: {0-100}

operations:
  - id: "OP-001"
    name: "{operation_name}"
    type: "{search|save|delete|...}"
    file: "api-specs/{operation_name}.yaml"

  - id: "OP-002"
    name: "{operation_name}"
    type: "{type}"
    file: "api-specs/{operation_name}.yaml"

dependencies:
  internal:
    - "{FEAT-ID}"
  external:
    - "{domain.component}"

statistics:
  endpoints: {count}
  mybatis_statements: {count}
  value_objects: {count}
  estimated_lines: {count}
```

### 1.2 API Spec Template

```yaml
# api-specs/{operation}.yaml - Endpoint Spec Template

endpoint:
  url: "/api/{domain}/{screenId}/{operation}"
  method: "POST"
  description: "{Description}"

miplatform_protocol:
  request:
    datasets:
      - name: "ds_search"
        vo_type: "{ScreenId}VO"
        purpose: "검색 조건"
        fields:
          - name: "{fieldName}"
            type: "{String|Integer|Date|...}"
            required: {true|false}
            description: "{Description}"

  response:
    datasets:
      - name: "ds_list"
        vo_type: "List<{ScreenId}VO>"
        purpose: "조회 결과"
        fields:
          - name: "{fieldName}"
            type: "{type}"
            source: "{table.column}"

architecture_layers:
  controller:
    file: "{ScreenId}Controller.java"
    method: "{methodName}"
    line: {lineNumber}

  task_service:
    interface: "{ScreenId}TS.java"
    implementation: "{ScreenId}TSImpl.java"
    method: "{methodName}"

  entity_service:
    interface: "{ScreenId}ES.java"
    implementation: "{ScreenId}ESImpl.java"
    method: "{methodName}"

  mybatis:
    namespace: "{namespace}"
    statement_id: "{statementId}"
    file: "{ScreenId}_SQL.xml"
```

### 1.3 MyBatis Mapping Template

```yaml
# mybatis-mappings/{statement}.yaml - SQL Mapping Template

mybatis_mapping:
  statement_id: "{statementId}"
  type: "{select|insert|update|delete}"
  result_type: "{VO class}"

sql:
  base_query: |
    SELECT
      column1,
      column2,
      column3
    FROM {table_name} t
    WHERE 1=1

  dynamic_conditions:
    - condition: "{param} != null"
      sql: "AND t.column = #{param}"

    - condition: "{startDate} != null and {endDate} != null"
      sql: "AND t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}"

  order_by: "ORDER BY t.{column} {ASC|DESC}"

tables:
  main: "{table_name}"
  joins:
    - table: "{join_table}"
      type: "LEFT JOIN"
      condition: "t.key = j.key"

parameters:
  - name: "{paramName}"
    type: "{type}"
    jdbc_type: "{VARCHAR|INTEGER|DATE|...}"
```

---

## 2. Validation Report Templates

### 2.1 Feature Validation Report

```yaml
# validation-report.yaml - Per-Feature Validation Report

validation_report:
  feature_id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
  screen_id: "{ScreenId}"
  domain: "{DOMAIN}"
  validated_at: "{ISO8601 timestamp}"
  validator: "{skill-name}"

overall:
  score: {0-100}
  status: "{PASS|WARNING|FAIL}"
  critical_issues: {count}
  major_issues: {count}
  minor_issues: {count}

dimensions:
  endpoint_equivalence:
    score: {0-25}
    max: 25
    issues:
      - severity: "{critical|major|minor}"
        description: "{issue description}"
        location: "{file:line}"

  sql_equivalence:
    score: {0-40}
    max: 40
    issues: []

  business_logic:
    score: {0-20}
    max: 20
    issues: []

  data_model:
    score: {0-15}
    max: 15
    issues: []

files_checked:
  generated:
    controller: "{path}"
    service: "{path}"
    mapper: "{path}"
    vo: "{path}"

  legacy:
    controller: "{path}"
    mapper: "{path}"

recommendation:
  action: "{proceed|remediate|escalate}"
  details: "{action details}"
```

### 2.2 Domain Summary Report

```yaml
# domain-summary.yaml - Domain Level Summary

domain_summary:
  domain: "{DOMAIN}"
  summary_date: "{YYYY-MM-DD}"
  generated_by: "{skill-name}"

progress:
  total_features: {count}
  validated: {count}
  passed: {count}
  failed: {count}
  pass_rate: "{percentage}%"

quality_metrics:
  average_score: {0-100}
  median_score: {0-100}
  score_distribution:
    "90-100": {count}
    "80-89": {count}
    "70-79": {count}
    "<70": {count}

issue_summary:
  blocker: {count}
  critical: {count}
  major: {count}
  minor: {count}

common_issues:
  - pattern: "{issue pattern}"
    count: {count}
    remediation: "{suggested fix}"

features:
  passed:
    - id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
      score: {score}

  failed:
    - id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
      score: {score}
      blocker_count: {count}
```

---

## 3. Remediation Templates

### 3.1 Remediation Report

```yaml
# remediation-report.yaml - Issue Remediation Report

remediation_report:
  id: "REM-{FEAT-ID}-{NNN}"
  feature_id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
  created_at: "{ISO8601}"
  completed_at: "{ISO8601}"
  remediated_by: "{agent/human}"

original_issue:
  validation_score: {score}
  failed_dimensions:
    - dimension: "{dimension_name}"
      score: {score}
      issues:
        - type: "{issue_type}"
          severity: "{severity}"
          description: "{description}"
          location: "{file:line}"

root_cause_analysis:
  cause: "{root cause description}"
  impact: "{impact description}"
  pattern_id: "{if applicable}"

remediation_applied:
  changes:
    - file: "{file_path}"
      change_type: "{modify|add|delete}"
      description: "{change description}"
      diff_reference: "{diff file path}"

validation_result:
  post_score: {score}
  status: "{PASS|FAIL}"
  dimensions:
    "{dimension}": {new_score}

lessons_learned:
  - "{lesson 1}"
  - "{lesson 2}"

related_features:
  - "{FEAT-ID}"  # Features with same pattern
```

### 3.2 Batch Remediation Plan

```yaml
# batch-remediation-plan.yaml - Pattern-Based Batch Fix

batch_remediation:
  id: "BATCH-REM-{NNN}"
  pattern_id: "{PATTERN-ID}"
  created_at: "{ISO8601}"

pattern_analysis:
  pattern_name: "{pattern description}"
  root_cause: "{common root cause}"
  occurrence_count: {count}

affected_features:
  - feature_id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
    location: "{file:line}"

  - feature_id: "FEAT-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}"
    location: "{file:line}"

remediation_strategy:
  approach: "{automated|semi-automated|manual}"
  steps:
    - step: 1
      action: "{action description}"
      automation: "{script/tool if applicable}"

    - step: 2
      action: "{action description}"

verification:
  method: "{re-validation|spot-check|full-test}"
  sample_size: "{if spot-check}"

execution_log:
  - timestamp: "{ISO8601}"
    action: "{action taken}"
    result: "{success|failure}"
    details: "{details}"
```

---

## 4. Progress Tracking Templates

### 4.1 Project Status Report

```yaml
# project-status.yaml - Overall Project Status

project_status:
  updated_at: "{ISO8601}"
  current_stage: {1-5}
  current_phase: {1-N}

stage_progress:
  stage_1:
    status: "{not_started|in_progress|completed}"
    phases:
      phase_1: "{status}"
      phase_2: "{status}"
      phase_3: "{status}"

  stage_2:
    status: "{status}"
    phases:
      phase_1: "{status}"
      phase_2: "{status}"
      phase_3: "{status}"
      phase_4: "{status}"
      phase_5: "{status}"

  # ... stages 3-5

domain_progress:
  CM:
    total: {count}
    completed: {count}
    percentage: "{%}"

  PA:
    total: {count}
    completed: {count}
    percentage: "{%}"

  # ... other domains

metrics:
  features_total: {count}
  features_completed: {count}
  overall_progress: "{%}"
  average_score: {score}
  pass_rate: "{%}"

blockers:
  - id: "{BLOCK-ID}"
    description: "{description}"
    impact: "{impact}"
    owner: "{owner}"

next_actions:
  - action: "{action}"
    target_date: "{date}"
    owner: "{owner}"
```

### 4.2 Phase Gate Report

```markdown
# Phase Gate Report Template

**Gate**: {Stage X Phase Y Gate Name}
**Feature/Domain**: {identifier}
**Checked At**: {timestamp}
**Checked By**: {agent/human}

## Decision: {PASS | CONDITIONAL_PASS | FAIL}

## Condition Results

| Condition | Required | Actual | Status |
|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
| {condition_1} | {value} | {value} | ✓/✗ |
| {condition_2} | {value} | {value} | ✓/✗ |

## Quality Metrics

| Metric | Target | Actual | Status |
|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| {metric_1} | {value} | {value} | ✓/✗ |
| {metric_2} | {value} | {value} | ✓/✗ |

## Issues (if any)

| Severity | Description | Resolution |
|----------|-------------|------------|
| {level} | {description} | {action} |

## Next Actions

- [ ] {action 1}
- [ ] {action 2}

## Approvals

- Checked by: {system/human}
- Approved by: {approver} (if override)
- Override reason: {if applicable}
```

---

## 5. SKILL.md Template

```markdown
---
name: {stage}-{phase}-{name}
description: {Brief description of the skill}
---

# {Skill Title}

**Version**: 1.0.0
**Stage**: {N}
**Phase**: {N}

---

## 1. Objective

{Clear statement of what this skill accomplishes}

## 2. Prerequisites

- [ ] {Prerequisite 1}
- [ ] {Prerequisite 2}

## 3. Inputs

```yaml
inputs:
  required:
    - name: "{input_name}"
      source: "{source location}"
      description: "{description}"

  optional:
    - name: "{input_name}"
      default: "{default value}"
```

## 4. Methodology

### Step 1: {Step Name}

{Detailed instructions}

### Step 2: {Step Name}

{Detailed instructions}

## 5. Outputs

```yaml
outputs:
  location: "{output directory}"
  files:
    - "{file_name}"
    - "{file_name}"
```

## 6. Quality Checks

- [ ] {Check 1}
- [ ] {Check 2}

## 7. Phase Gate Criteria

```yaml
gate_criteria:
  mandatory:
    - "{criterion}"
  quality:
    - metric: "{metric}"
      target: "{target}"
```

## 8. Error Handling

| Error | Cause | Resolution |
|-------|-------|------------|
| {error} | {cause} | {resolution} |

## 9. Next Phase

Upon successful completion, proceed to: `{next-skill-name}`
```

---

## 6. CLAUDE.md Sections Template

```markdown
# CLAUDE.md - {Project Name}

## Project Identity

```yaml
project_name: "{name}"
purpose: "{purpose}"
codebase: "{path}"
workspace: "{path}"
```

## System Context

### Scale

```yaml
scale:
  total_files: {count}
  controllers: {count}
  endpoints: {count}
  features: {count}
```

### Architecture

```yaml
architecture:
  pattern: "{pattern}"
  layers:
    - "{layer 1}"
    - "{layer 2}"
```

## Critical Rules

### Rule 1: {Rule Name}

```
✅ CORRECT:
- {correct approach}

❌ NEVER:
- {incorrect approach}
```

## Workflow Overview

```
{ASCII diagram of workflow}
```

## Skill Reference

| Stage | Phase | Skill | Description |
|-------|-------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | 1 | {skill} | {description} |

## Quick Reference

### Before Starting
1. {check 1}
2. {check 2}

### During Work
1. {guideline 1}
2. {guideline 2}

### After Completing
1. {action 1}
2. {action 2}
```
